meaning: n.海报,招贴,(布告,标语,海报等的)张贴者
examples: The artwork for the poster was done by my sister.
I had seen the poster for the jazz festival in Monterey.
Using a Magic Marker, he wrote seven digits on the poster-size banner.
So do strange ones, like the Vigor poster that depicts a tiger with his fangs around a tire.
Admittedly, Cyprus is not the ideal poster child for bail-in as a crisis management tool.
